items.desc_en: Nike is expected to report another quarter of declining sales as the sneaker giant struggles to regain strength under its turnaround strategy.
items.desc_zh: 耐克预计将报告另一个季度的销售额下降，因为这家运动鞋巨头在其扭亏为盈战略下努力恢复实力。

items.title_en: US Supreme Court upholds bans on transgender women in female school and college sports
items.title_zh: 美国最高法院维持禁止跨性别女性参加女子学校和大学体育运动的禁令
items.desc_en: It rules that states can ban transgender athletes from competing in women's and girls' sports.
items.desc_zh: 它规定各州可以禁止变性运动员参加女子和女童运动。

items.title_en: Supreme Court upholds birthright citizenship, blocks Trump order
items.title_zh: 最高法院维持出生公民权，阻止特朗普命令
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump attended oral arguments in the case, underscoring his staunch opposition to granting automatic citizenship to many immigrants' babies.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统出席了此案的口头辩论，强调他坚决反对向许多移民婴儿自动授予公民身份。

items.title_en: Trump's massive defense budget, depleted war machine, spark U.S. state battle for business and jobs
items.title_zh: 特朗普庞大的国防预算、耗尽的战争机器引发了美国各州的商业和就业之争
items.desc_en: Trump's huge defense budget request and a race to replenish weapons stocks while building hypersonic missiles lead to war between U.S. states for jobs.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普巨额国防预算要求以及在制造高超音速导弹的同时补充武器库存的竞赛导致了美国各州之间的就业战争。

items.title_en: Do you really, really love your job? Then you're not alone, according to surprising results from this survey
items.title_zh: 你真的、真的热爱你的工作吗？根据这项调查的令人惊讶的结果，你并不孤单
items.desc_en: Those surveyed showed a 78.9% rate of workers who "reported feeling positive at the end of their shifts."
items.desc_zh: 受访者显示，78.9% 的员工“表示在轮班结束时感觉积极”。

items.desc_zh: IBM 表示，它已经创造了世界上第一个已知的 1 纳米以下的芯片技术，但距离投入生产还需要一段时间。
